articles.summary: Capstone Copper: Stock Performance Snapshot Capstone Copper (TSX:CS) has drawn fresh attention after its recent share price move, with the stock up about 39% over the past month and roughly 35% over the past 3 months. articles.title: Capstone Copper Extends EBITDA Streak While Advancing Mantoverde And Santo Domingo
articles.summary: Capstone Copper (TSX:CS) reported a record sixth consecutive quarter of adjusted EBITDA growth. The company is advancing major growth projects, including the Mantoverde Optimized Project. Capstone Copper is moving toward a final investment decision on the Santo Domingo Project. The business continues to operate through recent challenges, including a strike related disruption. articles.title: Capstone Copper’s Record Output Fuels Guidance Confidence And Project Growth Prospects
articles.summary: Capstone Copper (TSX:CS) reports record copper production and confirms it has met its 2025 guidance. The company highlights progress on new growth projects, including the Mantoverde Optimized Project. Capstone advances the Santo Domingo Project through a new partnership aimed at developing the asset.
